subject: Excited to connect at the conference, Diego Alvarez
body:
Hi Diego Alvarez,

Saw you'll be at the conference and noticed your work at Loophole. Would love to swap notes on growth, developer experience.

[Lightfern will polish this in Gmail]


--- CONTEXT FOR LIGHTFERN (remove before sending) ---
Context for Lightfern (delete before sending):
Warmth sends scoring + lead data here so Lightfern can populate the
follow-up in Gmail. Human reviews/polishes in Gmail, then sends.

CLIENT:
  sender_email: getwarmth@gmail.com
  sender_name: Warmth

SCORES:

LEAD:

interests: growth, developer experience
